title: cyperus impolitus
intro: Cyperus impolitus, also known as the flat sedge or umbrella sedge, is a type of aquatic plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus impolitus include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, and can also be dried and used in powder form to be added to creams and ointments.
